ASBESTOS DISCOVERY 220, PETITIONER GERALDINE HILT'S MOTION TO TAKE THE DEPOSITION OF ROBERT HILT BY VIDEOTAPED DEPOSITION IS GRANTED PLAINTIFF'S MOTION SUBJECT TO ANY ABUSE SHOWN. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, MATTER NOT REPORTED

ASBESTOS DISCOVERY 220, PETITIONER GERALDINE HILT, AS ROBERT HILL'S SUCCESSOR-IN-INTEREST AND FUTURE WRONGFUL DEATH HEIR'S PETITION TO PERPETUATE TESTIMONY OF ROBERT HILT CONTINUED FROM FEB-25-2010 TO ASBESTOS DISCOVERY AT MAR-02-2010, 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 220. MATTER ARGUED. THE COURT ORDERED COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF / PETITIONER TO PROCEED WITH DEFENDANTS FOSTER WHEELER IMMEDIATELY. COUNSEL WILL MEET AND CONFER ON THE ISSUES IN THIS MOTION. THE COURT FURTHER CONTINUED THIS MATTER TO TUESDAY, MARCH 2, 2010 AT 9:00 A.M. IN DEPT. 220. COUNSEL ARE REQUESTED TO INFORM THE COURT OF THE REMAINING ISSUES IN THIS MATTER BEFORE 4:30 P.M. ON 3/1 VIA CONTESTASBESTOSTR@SFTC.ORG. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: SCOTT HUGHES, CSR # 12365

DISCOVERY 612, PETITION OF GERALDINE HILT TO PERPETUATE TESTIMONY OF ROBERT HILT BY VIDEOTAPED DEPOSITION IS GRANTED AND MODIFIED TO PROVIDE THAT THE DEPOSITION SHALL PROCEED NO SOONER THAN JANURAY 8, 2010. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Re: Amended Petition Of Geraldine Hilt To Perpetuate Testiony Of Robert Hilt By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar Mar-02-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Oren P. Noah, Esq. of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / Petitioner Geraldine Hilt, as Robert Hilt's SII and future wrongful death heir
Shelley K. Tinkoff, Esq. of BRYDON HUGO & PARKER (415-808-0300), specially appearing for defendants / opposing parties Dana Companies, LLC fka Dana Corporation, and specially appearing for Foster-Wheeler (Not yet a party in this action)
Timothy C. Connor, Esq. of TUCKER ELLIS & WEST (415-617-2209), appearing for defendant / opposing party Otis Elevator Company

RULING:
Petitioner Geraldine Hilt's motion to take the deposition of Robert Hilt by Videotaped Deposition. Argued and the Court granted plaintiff's motion subject to any abuse shown. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Matter not reported

Notice Of Hearing Re: Amended Petition Of Geraldine Hilt To Perpetuate Testiony Of Robert Hilt By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar Feb-25-2010 Continued To Mar-02-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 220
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Oren Noah, Esq., and Katherine Allen, Esq. of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / Petitioner Geraldine Hilt, as Robert Hill's successor-in-interest and future wrongful death heir
Roland E. The, Esq. of BRYDON HUGO & PARKER (415-808-0300), specially appearing for defendant / opposing party Dana Companies, LLC fka Dana Corporation; and appearing for Foster Wheeler (not a party in this action)
Timothy C. Connor, Esq. of TUCKER ELLIS & WEST (415-617-2209), appearing for defendant Otis Elevator Company
Jared A. Washkowitz, Esq. of LEWIS BRISBOIS BISGAARD & SMITH, (415-438-5925) for Sheedy Drayage (not a party in this action)

RULING:
Petitioner Geraldine Hilt, as Robert Hill's successor-in-interest and future wrongful death heir's petition to perpetuate testimony of Robert Hilt. Matter argued. The Court ordered counsel for plaintiff / petitioner to proceed with defendants Foster Wheeler immediately. Counsel will meet and confer on the issues in this motion. The Court further continued this matter to Tuesday, March 2, 2010 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 220. Counsel are requested to inform the Court of the remaining issues in this matter before 4:30 p.m. on 3/1 via ContestAsbestosTR@sftc.org. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Scott Hughes, CSR # 12365

Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition Of Geraldine Hilt To Perpetuate Testimony Of Robert Hilt By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar Nov-30-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCESE:
KIMBERLY CHU, ESQ., (415)898-1555, FOR PETITIONER/MOVING PARTY, Geraldine Hilt
NICOLE E. GAGE, ESQ., (415)617-2105, FOR RESPONDENT/OPPOSING PARTY

THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED AND ALSO MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Petition Of Geraldine Hilt To Perpetuate Testimony Of Robert Hilt By Videotaped Deposition is granted AND MODIFIED TO PROVIDE THAT THE DEPOSITION SHALL PROCEED NO SOONER THAN JANURAY 8, 2010. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED. (EAH/612)
